tools.name: emoji.autoEmojify
tools.description: Returns text of the post with emoji added

tools.name: emoji.emojiSuggestions
tools.description: Returns list of emoji suggestions for a given text of the post

tools.name: images.animateImage
tools.description: Returns URL of an animated GIF.

tools.name: images.companyLogo
tools.description:
Returns a company logo based on website domain. If the logo is not in our database yet, it will be extracted from the site on the fly. White logo background is automatically removed to make the logo look better on color backgrounds.

Note: It is not possible to access our company logo API publicly without authentication. If you wish to do so, you have to create proxy on your own server that calls our API from the server side.

tools.name: images.textToImage
tools.description: Returns URL of an image created from text according to given style parameters

tools.name: instagram.hashtagsCleaner
tools.description: Remove banned hashtags before posting to Instagram

tools.name: link.listOfCtAs
tools.description: Returns list of available CTA for current user. Requires each user to authenticate with RiteKit

tools.name: link.shortenLink
tools.description: Returns a shorten link with a given CTA.

tools.name: search.trendingHashtags
tools.description: Returns list of hashtags currently trending on Twitter

tools.name: stats.autoHashtag
tools.description: Returns auto-hashtagged text of the post.

tools.name: stats.hashtagHistory
tools.description: Returns historical stats for a given hashtag from the last 30 days

tools.name: stats.hashtagStats
tools.description: Returns real-time stats for up to 100 hashtags (updated hourly).

tools.name: stats.hashtagSuggestions
tools.description: Returns list of hashtag suggestions for a single-word topic or a shorter text up to 1000 characters. Takes into account both semantic relevancy and real-time hashtag popularity.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
